clipLayer.description: The vector layer to use as the cutline boundary.

cropToCutline.title: Crop to cutline extent
cropToCutline.description: Shrink the output extent to the cutline's bounding box. When off, the original raster extent is preserved and pixels outside the cutline are set to nodata.

outputFileName.description: Output file name for the clipped raster.

embedOutputLayer.title: Embed output clipped raster in jGIS file
